title: Round whole numbers to different place values
description: Practice rounding whole numbers to the nearest hundred, thousand, and ten thousand.
topic_path: Round whole numbers to different place values

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which whole number rounds to $500$ if we are rounding to the nearest hundred?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The smallest whole number that rounds to $500$ is $450$. 

[[☃ image 1]]

The largest whole number that rounds to $500$ is $549$.

[[☃ image 2]]

So, any whole number from $450$ to $549$ rounds to $500$.

Which answer choice is between $450$ and $549$?
$475$ rounds to $500$ when rounding to the nearest hundred.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which whole number rounds to $800$ if we are rounding to the nearest hundred?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The smallest whole number that rounds to $800$ is $750$. 

[[☃ image 1]]

The largest whole number that rounds to $800$ is $849$.

[[☃ image 2]]

So, any whole number from $750 $ to $849$ rounds to $800$.

Which answer choice is between $750$ and $849$?
$849$ rounds to $800$ when rounding to the nearest hundred.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which whole number rounds to $2{,}000$ if we are rounding to the nearest thousand?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The smallest whole number that rounds to $2{,}000$ is $1{,}500$. 

[[☃ image 1]]

The largest whole number that rounds to $2{,}000$ is $2{,}499$.


[[☃ image 2]]

So, any whole number from $1{,}500 $ to $2{,}499$ rounds to $2{,}000$.

Which answer choice is between $1{,}500$ and $2{,}499$?
$1{,}749$ rounds to $2{,}000$ when rounding to the nearest thousand.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which whole number rounds to $9{,}000$ if we are rounding to the nearest thousand?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The smallest whole number that rounds to $9{,}000$ is $8{,}500$. 

[[☃ image 1]]

The largest whole number that rounds to $9{,}000$ is $9{,}499$.

[[☃ image 2]]

So, any whole number from $8{,}500 $ to $9{,}499$ rounds to $9{,}000$.

Which answer choice is between $8{,}500$ and $9{,}499$?
$9{,}485$ rounds to $9{,}000$ when rounding to the nearest thousand.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which whole number rounds to $10{,}000$ if we are rounding to the nearest ten thousand?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The smallest whole number that rounds to $10{,}000$ is $5{,}000$. 

[[☃ image 1]]

The largest whole number that rounds to $10{,}000$ is $14{,}999$.

[[☃ image 2]]

So, any whole number from $5{,}000 $ to $14{,}999$ rounds to $10{,}000$.

Which answer choice is between $5{,}000$ and $14{,}999$?
$6{,}300$ rounds to $10{,}000$ when rounding to the nearest ten thousand.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which whole number rounds to $30{,}000$ if we are rounding to the nearest ten thousand?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The smallest whole number that rounds to $30{,}000$ is $25{,}000$. 

[[☃ image 1]]

The largest whole number that rounds to $30{,}000$ is $34{,}999$.

[[☃ image 2]]

So, any whole number from $25{,}000$ to $34{,}999$ rounds to $30{,}000$.

Which answer choice is between $25{,}000$ and $34{,}999$?
$34{,}599$ rounds to $30{,}000$ when rounding to the nearest ten thousand.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which whole number rounds to $700{,}000$ if we are rounding to the nearest hundred thousand?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The smallest whole number that rounds to $700{,}000$ is $650{,}000$. 

[[☃ image 1]]

The largest whole number that rounds to $700{,}000$ is $749{,}999$.

[[☃ image 2]]

So, any whole number from $650{,}000$ to $749{,}999$ rounds to $700{,}000$.

Which answer choice is between $65{0,}000$ and $749{,}999$?
$745{,}001$ rounds to $700{,}000$ when rounding to the nearest hundred thousand.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following digits could replace the $\square$ in the hundreds place to make this statement true?**

$4\square 29$ rounds to $5000$ if we round to the nearest thousand.

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Our number is less than $5000$, so it needs to round up to $5000$.

The smallest whole number that rounds up to $5000$ is $4500$. 

[[☃ image 1]]
So, the hundreds place in $4\square29$ must be a $5$ or higher.

The following numbers could replace the $\square$:

- $\blueD5$ 
- $\blueD8$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following digits could replace the $\square$ in the hundreds place to make this statement true?**

$27{,}\square 80$ rounds to $27{,}300$ if we round to the nearest hundred.

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
There is an $8$ in the tens place.  This means we will round *up* to the nearest hundred.  
Which of the following numbers rounds up to $27{,}300$?

[[☃ image 1]]

$27{,}\blueD280$ rounds up to $27{,}300$.

[[☃ image 1]]

The following number could replace the $\square$:

- $\blueD2$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following digits could replace the $\square$ in the tens place to make this statement true?**

$88{,}5\square1$ rounds to $88{,}500$ if we round to the nearest hundred.

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Our number is greater than $88{,}500$, so it needs to round down to $88{,}500$.

The largest whole number that rounds down to $88{,}500$ is $88{,}549$. 

[[☃ image 1]]
So, the tens place in $88{,}5\square1$ must be a $4$ or less.

The following numbers could replace the $\square$:


- $\blueD0$  
- $\blueD4$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following digits could replace the $\square$ in the tens place to make this statement true?**

$63\square5$ rounds to $6370$ if we round to the nearest ten.

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: There is an $5$ in the ones place.  This means we will round *up* to the nearest ten.

Which of the following numbers rounds up to $6370$?

[[☃ image 1]]

$63\blueD65$ rounds up to $6370$.

[[☃ image 1]]

The following number could replace the $\square$:

- $\blueD6$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following digits could replace the $\square$ in the thousands place to make this statement true?**

$5\square{,}264$ rounds to $50{,}000$ if we round to the nearest ten thousand.

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Our number is greater than $50{,}000$, so it needs to round down to $50{,}000$.

The largest whole number that rounds down to $50{,}000$ is $54{,}999$. 

[[☃ image 1]]
So, the thousands place in $5\square{,}264$ must be a $4$ or less.

The following numbers could replace the $\square$:

- $\blueD1$ 
- $\blueD3$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following digits could replace the $\square$ in the thousands place to make this statement true?**

$39\square{,}077$ rounds to $394{,}000$ if we round to the nearest thousand.

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: There is an $0$ in the hundreds place.  This means we will round *down* to the nearest thousand.

Which of the following numbers rounds down to $394{,}000$?

[[☃ image 1]]

$39\blueD4{,}077$ rounds down to $394{,}000$.

[[☃ image 1]]

The following number could replace the $\square$:

- $\blueD4$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following digits could replace the $\square$ in the ten thousands place to make this statement true?**

$7\square6{,}105$ rounds to $800{,}000$ if we round to the nearest  hundred thousand.

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Our number is less than $800{,}000$, so it needs to round up to $800{,}000$.

The smallest whole number that rounds up to $800{,}000$ is $750{,}000$. 

[[☃ image 1]]
So, the hundreds place in $7\square6{,}105$ must be a $5$ or higher.

The following numbers could replace the $\square$:

- $\blueD5$ 
- $\blueD8$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Round $84{,}552$ to each place value in the table.**  

Number | Nearest $1{,}000$ |  Nearest $100$
- | - | -
$84{,}552$ | [[☃ dropdown 1]] | [[☃ dropdown 2]]
hints:
###Meaning of rounding

Which pair of thousands is $84{,}552$ between? Which thousand is closer?

Which pair of hundreds is $84{,}552$ between? Which hundred is closer?

###Round to nearest $1{,}000$

[[☃ image 1]]

Is $\purpleD{84{,}552}$ closer to $84{,}000$ or $85{,}000$?

$\purpleD{84{,}552}$ is closer to $85{,}000$.

$\purpleD{84{,}552}$ rounded to the nearest $1{,}000$ is $85{,}000$.

###Round to nearest $100$

[[☃ image 1]]

Is $\purpleD{84{,}552}$ closer to $84{,}500$ or $84{,}600$?

[[☃ explanation 1]]

$\purpleD{84{,}552}$ is closer to $84{,}600$.

$\purpleD{84{,}552}$ rounded to the nearest $100$ is $84{,}600$.

- | - | -

hints:

Which pair of ten thousands is $796{,}154$ between? Which ten thousand is closer?

###Round to nearest $100{,}000$

Is $\blueE{796{,}154}$ closer to $700{,}000$ or $800{,}000$?

###Round to nearest $10{,}000$

![A number line with 790000 on the left, a mark at the middle, and 800000 on the right. The point 796154 is between the middle and the right.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1f3dabf94f7fcec5618b12137731464154915690)

Is $\blueE{796{,}154}$ closer to $790{,}000$ or $800{,}000$?

[[☃ explanation 1]]
